title: OpenCombatUtility (OpenCU)
body:
## Open Combat Utility

#### Current features:  
- Repulsor - can pull, push, move and slow entities in pulses. API available on github  
- Modular Dispenser - like vanilla dispenser or dropper but better!  

#### Coming in 2.0.0
- No more Modular Dispenser, welcome Modular Frame!  
Overhauled Modular Frame can now hold more types of devices including: eye of ender?
- Repulsor no longer can use Vector Pulse by default however can be inserted into the Modular Frame
- CC: Tweaked is now optional, devices can now also be used with redstone or manually
- Support for both **Forge** (in future **NeoForge**) and **Fabric** on MC 1.19.4 and beyond
- And even more

Some of these features are already available in preview versions

#### Compats
- Valkyrien Skies 2 (since 1.3.1, 1.18.2 only)

#### I am open to suggestions!  

If you have any suggestions open an [issue on github](https://github.com/LubieKakao1212/OpenCombatUtility/issues) or ask on [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/3dDJwBBYTk)

--- 

#### 1.12.2 version of this mod requires OpenComputers

#### 1.18.2 versions require CC: Tweaked

---
